     The Numbers Business Report

Closer (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $33,987,757Details
International Box Office $82,160,780
Worldwide Box Office $116,148,537
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Set in contemporary London, a story of passion, drama, love, and abandonment involving four strangers--their chance meetings, instant attractions and casual betrayals.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,707,972 (22.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.41 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:29.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:476 opening theaters/1,098 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $62,191,364

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 3rd, 2004 (Limited) by Sony Pictures
December 17th, 2004 (Expands Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: January 21st, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
February 3rd, 2005 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: March 29th, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of graphic sexual dialogue, nudity/sexuality and language
Running Time: 104 minutes
Plot point: False Identity, Infidelity, Love Triangle, Relationships Gone Wrong
Social setting: Strippers / Stripping
Subgenre: Erotic Drama
Source:Based on Play
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Avenue Pictures Productions
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English
